payload.goal: Produce buildable spec from research brief

payload.summary: Initial spec: wrong geometry, wrong dock concept
Improved animation model, added smart-home features (ESP32, mmWave)

payload.critic: MCP73871 is single-cell Li-Ion. Spec requires 4×AA NiMH (4S, ~5.6V peak).
payload.action: Retract specific IC choice; mark charger topology as unresolved.

payload.summary: First faithful-reconstruction attempt, charger topology TBD

payload.critic: Manual states 8×16 rectangular array. Flame shape is the rendered animation, not the physical population.
payload.action: Distinguish physical population (rectangular) from emitted image (flame).

payload.summary: Canonical faithful spec with source discipline (Published/Observation/Inference tags)

payload.reason: Charger topology unresolved — cannot produce a fabricable board without knowing the boost/charge architecture.
payload.decision: STOP at architecture level. Do not proceed to PCB layout.
payload.insight: Agent knows what it doesn't know.

payload.derivative_path: Modernized 1S Li-ion base + ATtiny1616 + dual charlieplex drivers — proceed to build
payload.rationale: Faithful path blocked on charger unknowns. Derivative path (v5_modernized) uses ATtiny1616 + 2× IS31FL3731-QF — all specs resolved, buildable today.

payload.summary: Active build target: ATtiny1616, 2× IS31FL3731-QF, 4-layer 430×30mm, all specs resolved
